zh.lifeSummary: 當John William Covey於1583年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，他的父親William Richard Covey32歲，母親Annie Lucretia Quisst25歲。他於1598年6月5日與Joan Dagwell在英國英格蘭哈普爾諾武德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1638年3月15日在英國英格蘭倫敦享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John William Covey于1583年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，他的父亲William Richard Covey32岁，母亲Annie Lucretia Quisst25岁。他于1598年6月5日与Joan Dagwell在英国英格兰哈普爾諾武德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1638年3月15日在英国英格兰倫敦享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Covey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: shortened form of MacCovey, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cobhthaigh (see Coffey ).

English: unexplained. Covey is used of ‘pantry’ in the early modern period and covey ‘little chap’ (a diminutive of cove, Middle English cof ‘bold, eager, courageous’; see Cove ) in the early nineteenth century, but there is no evidence to confirm either as the source for the surname.

variants.name: Coffey
meanings: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cathbhadha ‘descendant of Cathbhadh’, a byname meaning ‘battle tent’, Ó Cathbhuadhaigh ‘descendant of Cathbhuadhach’ (‘battle victorious’), or Ó Cathmhogha ‘descendant of Cathmhugh’ (‘battle slave’).
shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cobhthaigh ‘descendant of Cobhthach’, a byname meaning ‘victorious’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When John William Covey was born in 1583, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Richard Covey, was 32 and his mother, Annie Lucretia Quisst, was 25. He married Joan Dagwell on 5 June 1598, in Northwood, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 15 March 1638, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John William Covey est né en 1583, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Richard Covey, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Annie Lucretia Quisst, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joan Dagwell le 5 juin 1598, à Northwood, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 mars 1638, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John William Covey 1583 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Richard Covey 32 und seine Mutter Annie Lucretia Quisst 25. Er hat am 5. Juni 1598 in Northwood, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Dagwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. März 1638 im Alter von 55 Jahren in London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John William Covey è nato il nel 1583 nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Richard Covey, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Annie Lucretia Quisst, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joan Dagwell il 5 giugno 1598, nel Northwood, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 marzo 1638, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John William Coveyが1583年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Richard Coveyは32歳，母Annie Lucretia Quisstは25歳であった。1598年6月5日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアノースウッドでJoan Dagwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1638年3月15日にイギリスイギリスロンドンで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John William Covey(이)가 1583년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Richard Covey(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Annie Lucretia Quisst(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1598년 6월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 노르스우드에서 Joan Dagwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1638년 3월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John William Covey nasceu em 1583, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Richard Covey, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Annie Lucretia Quisst, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Dagwell em 5 de junho de 1598, em Northwood, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de março de 1638, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John William Covey родился в 1583 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Richard Covey было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Annie Lucretia Quisst, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Dagwell 5 июня 1598 г. в местности нортвуд, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 15 марта 1638 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John William Covey nació en 1583, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Richard Covey, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Annie Lucretia Quisst, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Joan Dagwell el 5 de junio de 1598, en Northwood, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de marzo de 1638, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
